item.title: 🍽 HUB1 - Sprout Lunch Menu:
item.description: 🍽 HUB1 - Sprout Lunch Menu: Our daily meal salad rich in seasonal vegetables with a choice of protein

item.title: 🍽 HUB1 - Homebound Lunch Menu:
item.description: 🍽 HUB1 - Homebound Lunch Menu: Crispy fish and chips made with Danish plaice fillets, golden and tender,served with seasoned potato wedges. Finished with creamy tartar sauce, grilledlemon and fresh dill (1+2+3+6)

item.title: 🍽 HUB1 - Globetrotter Lunch Menu:
item.description: 🍽 HUB1 - Globetrotter Lunch Menu: Creamy risotto with chicken, mushrooms and cabbage, rich and comforting, toppedwith crispy chicken crackling, parmesan and fresh parsley. Served with olivefocaccia and Italian salads, with balsamic glaze and basil oil on the side (1+6+13+15) GREEN DISH: dish Creamy risotto with soy chunks, mushrooms and cabbage, topped with crisp carrotchips, parmesan and fresh parsley. Served with olive focaccia and Italiansalads, with balsamic glaze and basil oil on the side

item.title: 🍽 HUB3 - Lunch Menu:
item.description: 🍽 HUB3 - Lunch Menu: Chili con carne with tender beef, black beans and kidney beans, enriched witharomatic coffee for depth. Served with rice (15) GREEN DISH: dish Chili sin carne with black beans and kidney beans, finished with aromaticcoffee and warm spices. Served with rice

item.title: 🍽 HUB2 - Lunch Menu:
item.description: 🍽 HUB2 - Lunch Menu: Slow braised pork belly in apple cider, tender and full of flavour, served withfried rice and vegetables (7+8+13+15) GREEN DISH: dish Hoisin marinated tofu, caramelised and rich in umami, served with fried riceand vegetables

item.title: 🍽 HUB1 – Kays - Lunch Menu:
item.description: 🍽 HUB1 – Kays - Lunch Menu: Juicy turkey tossed in Nordic pesto, served with pearl barley and sautéedcabbage. Finished with fresh cress cream and pickled onions (1+6) GREEN DISH: dish Tofu tossed in Nordic pesto, served with pearl barley and sautéed cabbage.Finished with cress cream and pickled onions (1+6+7)
